title: The Unlucky Apple
content:
'Twas the apple that in Eden
    Caused our father's primal fall;
    And the Trojan War, remember--
    'Twas an apple caused it all.
    So for weeks I've hesitated,
    You can guess the reason why,
    For I want to tell my darling
    She's the apple of my eye.
meaning:
Paul Laurence Dunbar's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Unlucky Apple"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
